hero.headline: Custom AI Software for Your Business
hero.subheadline: We build AI automation that saves time and money — from prototypes to production-ready systems tailored to your workflows.
visual.title: From idea to working prototype
visual.text: We ship small experiments that prove value quickly using vector search, RAG, and private LLM integrations.
services.title: Our Services
services.sub: We help companies integrate intelligent automation across teams and products.
service.internal.title: Internal Knowledge AI
service.internal.text: Build a private ChatGPT-style assistant trained on company documents using RAG and vector search.
service.support.title: AI Recruitment Support
service.support.text: AI-powered resume analysis and initial candidate vetting to quickly identify the most qualified applicants and reduce manual screening time
service.doc.title: AI Document Processing
service.doc.text: Upload contracts, invoices, or PDFs and automatically extract structured information using AI.
service.leads.title: AI Lead Intelligence
service.leads.text: AI system that analyzes and scores leads from CRM data and recommends the best prospects.
service.logs.title: AI Log Analyzer
service.logs.text: AI tool that analyzes system logs and finds root causes of errors in microservices or cloud systems.
process.title: How We Work
process.step1.title: Understand the business problem
process.step1.text: We begin by mapping goals, constraints, and success metrics with key stakeholders.
process.step2.title: Build AI prototype
process.step2.text: Rapid proof-of-concept to validate assumptions and measure impact.
process.step3.title: Deploy production solution
process.step3.text: Harden the system, add monitoring, and integrate with your stack.
process.step4.title: Ongoing optimization
process.step4.text: Continuous improvement driven by data and user feedback.
benefits.title: Benefits
benefit.1.title: Save engineering time
benefit.1.text: Automate mundane coding and data pre-processing tasks so engineers focus on impactful work.
benefit.2.title: Automate repetitive work
benefit.2.text: Reduce manual effort and accelerate throughput across teams.
benefit.3.title: Improve decision making
benefit.3.text: Surface insights and recommendations that help teams act faster.
benefit.4.title: Reduce operational costs
benefit.4.text: Optimize processes and reduce human error with AI-driven automation.
cta_section.title: Start Your AI Transformation
cta_section.text: We design solutions that deliver measurable ROI.
contact.title: Talk to an AI expert
contact.sub: Tell us about your company and the problem you want to solve — we'll follow up to schedule a free consultation.
